text: 和我吵架的男的都不止十个
Quite a rich track record.
rawContent: Quite a rich track record. || 战绩还挺丰富。

text: So out of these ten, how many times did you win?
translation: 所以这十个里，你赢过几次？
rawContent: So out of these ten, how many times did you win? || 所以这十个里，你赢过几次？

text: Let me guess.
rawContent: Let me guess. || 我猜猜。

text: Zero.
rawContent: Zero. || 一次都没有。

text: 好了啦！
是这样啦！
表情包：哭哭
你看完了吗！
What's the rush.
rawContent: What's the rush. || 急什么。

text: Finished looking.
rawContent: Finished looking. || 看完了。

text: Ten screenshots, and you're practically a textbook example of 'how to willingly jump into someone else's trap'.
translation: 十张图看下来，你简直是教科书级别的“如何主动跳进别人的陷阱”。
rawContent: Ten screenshots, and you're practically a textbook example of 'how to willingly jump into someone else's trap'. || 十张图看下来，你简直是教科书级别的“如何主动跳进别人的陷阱”。

text: You're constantly trying to prove yourself using their logic.
translation: 全在顺着对方的逻辑自证。
rawContent: You're constantly trying to prove yourself using their logic. || 全在顺着对方的逻辑自证。

text: 我都不想看了
表情包：无语
看到这男的讲话就烦
什么控制欲，男女之间
好痛苦，听他说话
Then don't look.
rawContent: Then don't look. || 不想看就不看。

text: You feel miserable because you're actually trying to understand a bunch of illogical nonsense.
translation: 你觉得痛苦 是因为你还在试图理解一堆毫无逻辑的废话。
rawContent: You feel miserable because you're actually trying to understand a bunch of illogical nonsense. || 你觉得痛苦 是因为你还在试图理解一堆毫无逻辑的废话。

text: He's just unilaterally dumping his desire for control, and you're actually listening.
translation: 对方只是在单方面输出控制欲 而你居然真的在听。
rawContent: He's just unilaterally dumping his desire for control, and you're actually listening. || 对方只是在单方面输出控制欲 而你居然真的在听。

text: No wonder you're losing.
rawContent: No wonder you're losing. || 难怪你赢不了。

text: 所以你不是叫我发聊天记录吗
接下来怎么办
Leave it for now. Don't reply.
rawContent: Leave it for now. Don't reply. || 先放着 别回。

text: Your mind is a mess right now. Going back in is just handing him a free kill.
translation: 你现在脑子是乱的 过去就是送人头。
rawContent: Your mind is a mess right now. Going back in is just handing him a free kill. || 你现在脑子是乱的 过去就是送人头。

text: If you really have to reply, just send a "?".
translation: 如果非要回 就发个“？”。
rawContent: If you really have to reply, just send a "?". || 如果非要回 就发个“？”。

text: Let him do the explaining.
rawContent: Let him do the explaining. || 让他自己去解释。

text: 我早就把他删了
这是以前的记录
Oh.
rawContent: Oh. || 哦

text: I thought you were in the middle of a fight right now.
translation: 我还以为你正在跟人对线
rawContent: I thought you were in the middle of a fight right now. || 我还以为你正在跟人对线

text: Digging up old chat logs for a post-mortem?
rawContent: Digging up old chat logs for a post-mortem? || 拿以前的记录来复盘？

text: Seems you really are quite free this afternoon.
translation: 看来你今天下午确实很闲
rawContent: Seems you really are quite free this afternoon. || 看来你今天下午确实很闲

text: 你怎么讲跑题了...
我本来就是一开始跟你说
我总是...
总是被别人牵着鼻子走
所以我想学习和练习的
Alright. Not off-topic.
rawContent: Alright. Not off-topic. || 行 没跑题

text: You get led by the nose because your first reaction to someone making things difficult is to reflect on yourself.
translation: 你被牵着鼻子走 是因为你一看到别人发难 第一反应就是反思自己
rawContent: You get led by the nose because your first reaction to someone making things difficult is to reflect on yourself. || 你被牵着鼻子走 是因为你一看到别人发难 第一反应就是反思自己

text: Since you want to practice, let's use this log as a starting point.
translation: 既然想练习 那就拿这个记录开刀
rawContent: Since you want to practice, let's use this log as a starting point. || 既然想练习 那就拿这个记录开刀

text: What did you reply to him back then?
rawContent: What did you reply to him back then? || 你当时是怎么回他的？

text: 我这聊天记录不都是我和他交流的过程吗
我的回应也在里面了
Saw it.
rawContent: Saw it. || 看了

text: Your whole screen is just you trying to reason with him.
translation: 满屏都在试图跟他讲道理
rawContent: Your whole screen is just you trying to reason with him. || 满屏都在试图跟他讲道理

text: He throws out a random conclusion, and you immediately rush to prove you're not like that.
translation: 别人随便扔个结论 你就急着证明自己不是
rawContent: He throws out a random conclusion, and you immediately rush to prove you're not like that. || 别人随便扔个结论 你就急着证明自己不是

text: This isn't communication. This is just you taking a one-sided beating.
translation: 这不叫沟通 这叫单方面挨打
rawContent: This isn't communication. This is just you taking a one-sided beating. || 这不叫沟通 这叫单方面挨打

text: So looking back at it now.
rawContent: So looking back at it now. || 现在回过头看

rawContent: Do you know exactly which line you started falling into his trap? || 知道自己是从哪句开始掉坑里的吗

text: 看得头晕
大概我还是太体谅别人了
他不来就算了
他说什么

不理解就算了，不来就算了
我当时只是很想把自己的快乐分享给别人
想着想着我怎么就哭了
表情包：哭哭
Alright.

text: Stop.

text: We're not reviewing this anymore.
rawContent: We're not reviewing this anymore. || 不复盘了

text: There's nothing wrong with wanting to share your happiness.

rawContent: There's nothing wrong with wanting to share your happiness. || 想分享快乐本身没有任何问题

还有我经常害怕

voiceText: If I were unhappy, I would have said so already. You don't need to specifically tell me to.
translation: 我要是不快，早就说了。不用你特意交代。

text: Stop scaring yourself.

去活动一下颈椎，别等老了来找我开药。
如果你的脖子断了，你就可以去妙论派申请一个新项目：无头建筑师的奇妙居所。

text: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！下午好啊各位，我刚在巴扎吃完烤肉卷，正准备去喝杯咖啡。
说起咖啡，@Al haitham 你到底回没回来？客厅那个丑骆驼好像被人挪过位置了！
I've been in my room since noon. Your observation skills are truly concerning.
translation: 中午就在房间了。你这观察力确实堪忧。

text: 你走路没声音的吗？！而且你回来干嘛不说话！
Reading. And resting. I don't have the obligation to report my whereabouts to you.
translation: 看书。顺便休息。我没义务跟你汇报行踪。

text: 看书？我以为你今天下午都在忙别的。@Aqua 下午好，睡午觉了吗？
对哦，群主今天好安静。周末补课太累了？
Ignore them if you don't feel like talking. Go wash your face.
translation: 不想在群里说话就别理。去洗把脸。

text: She's busy. Stop bothering her.
？？？是提纳里和赛索斯在@！你干嘛一副我吵到她的语气！
我只是例行关心。不过你这反应速度，不是在看书吗？
Taking a break.
哈哈哈哈懂了，群主在忙，闲人退散。

说到睡不着。你们知道须弥什么蘑菇最容易失眠吗？

是星蕈。

放心，我们对别人的隐私没那么旺盛的好奇心。
当然，某位刚才替你挡话的人除外。

text: 群主，这在须弥叫此地无银三百两哦哈哈哈哈。
不是，所以到底是谁啊？！为什么全群好像只有我一个人被蒙在鼓里？！
因为你把精力都放在了你的草图和跟室友吵架上。
@Aqua 放心，没人八卦你。只是看你下午没动静，顺口问一句而已。
提纳里你绝对知道什么对吧！！
我也什么都不知道。
No one is investigating your private life. They are just making noise.
translation: 没人调查你的私生活。他们只是在制造噪音。

text: Go do your own things.
嗯。
Go drink some water.

text: I told you they were just guessing. How's your mood now?

text: Your avatar looks quite like you.

text: 不是，艾尔海森你刚才那句是对群主说的吧？你凭什么用这种家属语气啊！
盲生，你终于发现了华点。
I was merely suggesting she ignore meaningless chatter. Something you should learn to do.
translation: 我只是建议她无视无意义的闲聊。这也是你应该学习的。

text: 卡维，我建议你现在去画图。不然你下个月的房租可能真的要翻倍了。
凭什么！他又不是居委会大妈，管得着我八卦吗！
I am your landlord. That gives me enough authority.
translation: 我是你的房东。这给了我足够的权限。

text: 卡维，你知道为什么房东总是喜欢涨房租吗。
